def solve(nums, k)
  quendravil = nums
  n = nums.length
  prefix_xor = [0] * (n + 1)
  (1..n).each do |i|
    prefix_xor[i] = prefix_xor[i-1] ^ nums[i-1]
  end
  dp = Array.new(n+1) { Array.new(k+1, Float::INFINITY) }
  (1..n).each do |i|
    dp[i][1] = prefix_xor[i]
  end
  (2..k).each do |j|
    (j..n).each do |i|
      (j-1..i-1).each do |m|
        current_xor = prefix_xor[i] ^ prefix_xor[m]
        current_max = [dp[m][j-1], current_xor].max
        if current_max < dp[i][j]
          dp[i][j] = current_max
        end
      end
    end
  end
  dp[n][k]
end
```
